title: Midnight Falls
description:
When you're a seventeen-year-old girl with anxiety disorder and a gorgeous, popular girl that absolutely hates your guts for who-knows-what reason bullying you whenever she gets the chance, Anna Falls has no choice but to face reality....
her life sucks. 

But the little sparks of hope that build up her optimistic, bright soul convince her otherwise. She will always think of one thing and that there is hope in life. Maybe even a goal. It might not be visible now, but she knew that it became as clear as a bell when she ran into Luke Carter. Twice. In one day. Second time being literally into him.

                                                        --

"How about fifty-fifty?" I offer in ragged breaths.
"We could have just done this from the beginning," he replies, breathing heavily. We both chuckle.
I gaze into his green eyes. "Your eyes are really beautiful," I blurt out.
"I know," he smirks.
"Are you always that egotistic?" 
"It depends," he answers, pushing my hair behind my ear.
I smile at him. "You're welcome then."
"I never said thank you."
"And I said you're welcome. Are we done, Catherine Obvious?" 

                                                      --

title: Falling for Mr Mafia
description:
"You don't want me I'm broken. Unfixable."

"Broken or not your still my princess."

Soon his lips are on mine and sparks flew all my worries for once vanished. 

That's when I knew. 

I'm falling for Mr Mafia.
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Diego Rodriguez.
Son of one of the most ruthless mafia boss. His not almost like his father. Diego is more of a bad boy. Breaks rules. Fools around but not with girls. He wants trouble and danger. So he entered his own boxing championship. Everyone knowing him as the 'king' of the ring. 

Megan Moon. A nerd-geek. Beautiful. Smart. Sociable. But her life isn't all that gold. Her father is an abusive. Megan's mother was beaten everyday trying to protect her. Knowing she needs to find a way out of her fathers hand, Megan stumbles across some gangsters. Quickly understanding her situation, her newly found friends introduced her to the mafia. Finding a chance, Megan joined the boxing championship and became the 'princess' of the ring. Catching the eye of the 'king'.

What happens when these two cross paths in school and their secret life. 

Read on to find out! This is a sequel to 'Helping Mr Mafia' read that first! 

Please don't steal!

authorBio:
I grew up in Switzerland and thanks to my father's job with an airline travelled to many far-away places from an early age. Even better though, I discovered, were journeys to imaginary worlds. And so I trudged through the Mines of Moria, sailed on the Dawn Treader, fought in the Trojan War and rode telepathic dragons.

Even then I was always scribbling stories in my notebooks, but nothing came of it until much later. I went on to study English and History, eventually ended up with a job in information technology and started a family.

However, the urge to create my own worlds and stories remained, so when it was quiet in the evenings I slipped away to places that existed only in the imagination - the results you can find on these pages. I hope you'll join me on my journeys and enjoy them as much as I do!

title: Hit List
description:
Bree Portman has a rather unusual job. She is paid to kill people, and her next target is the one and only Elijah Lancaster - her ex-best friend.

He is known to be a man whore, and it seems that he 'accidentally' slept with a married woman. Now, someone wants him dead, and she has to get rid of him. 

Elijah is always surrounded by people, particularly of the female gender, and Bree figures that the best way to kill him without causing a scene, is by getting close to him again. 

Maybe that wasn't her best decision...

title: Remember. [TMNT 2012]
description:
[Book 1 of the Coldblooded Compassion series]

   "Game on."

   She didn't ask for this.  She didn't want to be pulled into the cruel, evil shadows of the world.  She tried to be a good person to both her mother and younger brother.  She even stifled angry thoughts of her father, the heartless man who abandoned the family when she was only four years old.  Her only goal was to make people smile.  She didn't deserve to be dragged into the dark.   But life has never been very fair.

   He didn't mean to involve her in his dark world.  In fact, he didn't know she existed until he found her being treated as a guinea pig.  He thought rescuing her would reverse the death that lingered over her.  He tried to prevent her from getting trapped deeper within the pit of criminals and catastrophes biting at her heels.  But heroes can't always save the day.

   Now, the turtles and she are sinking further into the quicksand of this mystery.  Every answer seems to have another impossible question.  Every solution has another negative side effect.  Will the turtles ever be able to dig themselves out of their graves?

description:

A full blooded Nigerian girl with a lot of problems on her plate. Being a single parent, she spends most of her time working to put food on the plates of that of her and her daughter. All she wants is to keep her child safe and survive the atrocities of life.

title: The Bodyguard
description:
"Out and about to explore the world, Dora?" A deep voice behind me laughed. 

Of course I knew who stood there but I thought he had left hours ago and would come back tomorrow morning to pick me up. 

He leaned casually against the beige wall of the garage and stubbed a cigarette out behind himself. 

"My dad will be pissed when he sees that" I ignored his question and pointed at the small scorch on the wall. 

The street lamps' light reflected in his blue eyes and made them look like they were shining at me. 

He pushed himself off the wall and with three steps he stood directly in front of me. I had to put my head back to look him in the face. 

"Want one?" He asked and raised his right arm. I turned my head to see a small box of cigarettes in his hand. 

It was dark outside, the only light came from the street lamp across the street and the stars. 

The light drew long shadows on his face but I could still observe it perfectly. Clear skin, full lips and long eyelashes. 

I shook my head and whispered "I don't really support smoking."


"Yeah, me neither" he smirked and nodded slowly. 

I won't lie. He is really handsome and there definitely is a part to me that is attracted to him but I should really go now if I want to catch that train. 

--------------------------

  Angry and hurt, his sanctuary became the world he found in music and he shut out the world.
  
  But when a new girl emerges on the scene and attempts breaking through his walls, Everett realizes all bets are off.
  
  So now, it's up to the girl with a pocket full of dreams to show the boy who gave up  that life has plenty of things worth fighting for.

title: Tea For Two
description:
"Just wondering, Shoemaker. Are you going to tell your parents? Or should I?"
                                                                                                                                                                 
When I was little, I was terribly afraid of heights. One day, in a bleak attempt to rid me of this, my father climbed onto the roof of our one story house with me on his back. I may have been hyperventilating, but otherwise I was doing well- until my foot slid across the shingles. It was only a foot or two that I moved, but my heart stopped.
                                                                                                                           
Right now, I feel like I've slid ten feet down the roof of my house on a bitterly cold day.
                                                                                             
"Because, last I remember, aren't they kind of conservative?" he continues.
                                                                                                 
August is a 16-year-old closeted bisexual girl. When a girl moves in next door, her calm life is slightly shaken, and then turned upside down. Because she isn't just any girl next door: Emily is a gorgeous, red-haired, baseball-playing, fully out-and-proud lesbian.  When the two girls grow close, things begin to change in their small town.

title: Percy Jackson-The Grandson of Voldemort
description:
Percy Jackson has always been different.  Even by demigod standards.  

He had normal demigod problems...dyslexia, ADHD, and monsters.  

He had normal problems.  Bad grades, getting into trouble at school, that kind of stuff.

But he was also the son of Poseidon, the subject of two Great Prophecies, the Hero and Savior of Olympus, one of the only living beings...gods included, to survive Tartarus, one of the only demigods to bathe in the Styx, and one of the only beings that ever held the sky.  All that makes him different.

But now, he was about to delve further into abnormality, when he finds out he has another evil grandfather.  This time it isn't an evil, immortal, all powerful Titan Lord that likes eating his kids...just a powerful, evil noseless creep with a freakish, yet hilarious name that somehow makes people flinch.

And now, Perseus Jackson, the son of Poseidon, is about to go on his strangest adventure yet...going to Hogwarts School of Magic.  Yet another tragically hilarious name.


(Look, I know there are a lot of these and it's pretty classic, cliche, and slightly overused, but I promise you readers that this story does not fit into that mold.  Give it a shot, and see how it goes.  But if anyone steals my plot...I'll feed you to my pet Hellhound :). )

title: The Jock, The Nerd and The Geek
description:
The Jock:
Paris Holmes, also known as Hermes. The most popular boy in all of Wystwood High who everyone hates to love. Pros: is an exceptional basketball player, but one of the top ranking students with excellent grades and a pretty face to top it. His Con? He's a narcissist with homophobic tendencies and seems to think everyone is beneath him.

The Nerd:
Alex Parker, also known as A. She once was the most popular girl in school when she was a freshman but suddenly stayed away from them, focusing only on her studies and herself. Pros: She knows everything about everyone. Is the go-to girl when you need some help with your assignments. She could also pretend to be your girlfriend if you ask and pay well. Cons: Most of the people who claim to have spoken to her once, seem terrified of talking about her again.

The Geek:
Marcos Gomez, also known as Eros. The most beautiful femboy in Wystwood and every boy and girls dream, even though he doesn't think he's as pretty as they seem to think. Pros: He's soft as a teddy bear, smells like cookies and is the most obedient puppy you'd ever meet. Is good with computers and you can help find out anything you need. Is the perfect person when you want a makeover. Cons: Don't touch his A. Don't look at his A. Don't talk to his A.

~

One day, Paris Holmes walked in on a session between Marcos and Alex and found himself hooked to the girl, even though she already has a boyfriend.

Still, he doesn't care. He's ready to be anything as long as he can stay by her side.

But is affection really genuine? Would Alex, who is proceeding with caution fall for him? Or would Marcos fight for what belongs to him?

The three most important figures in Wystwood now playing a game with each other.

What could possibly go wrong?

title: Wrong Side Of The Bed
description:
Jannat - a girl made of copious amounts of sarcasm, a bit (lot) of a diva and an unwavering love for all things fashion - has loved the golden boy of the school, Lucas, since forever. 

And much to her dismay, Jannat's arch nemesis - Christian, also known as the second Voldemort, ugly reincarnation of the devil, etc., is none other than Lucas' best friend.

But when things take a turn which none of them had anticipated, Jannat & Christian are forced to team up, in the name of love (or is it hate?) and things become genuinely, certainly, obviously, very, madly complicated.

But well, what's a little fake dating your arch-rival when you know that your heart beats for the golden boy you've loved since forever, right? Right?

And to think that it all started with the wrong side of the bed.

                               ● ● ●

description:

title: The Trouble Next Door
description:
Ready to become the worst Bengali and Gujarati love angel on the internet. Tie your heart up. ;) Divya's Life without Love sounds peaceful, drama-free world flips upside down thanks to Shraddha, a Guju tenant who's a constant source of irritation. Love or hate?

 All Divya feels is a desperate need to kick Shraddha out and never see her again-preferably with a -Do Not Disturb- sign permanently attached.

If you enjoy slow poison kind of love, the slow love story of Divya and Shraddha will fill your heart with joy. If you're looking for a light novel that's just fun and relaxing, with no complicated drama, this book is packed with entertainment for you!

Genres: 💫Neighbors, Art, Enemies to Lovers, Bengali-Gujarati Duo. Slow-Burn. Sapphic.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writing heals me. I try different ideas, some succeed, others fail, but I'll always keep discovering new paths.

Rom-com and philosophy are among my favorite genres.

I can learn so much from a single story and a rom-com has the magic to pull us out of a complicated world, bringing a smile to our faces and a tickle to our stomachs.

All my stories are queer because I feel there's still a lack of queer content out there.

Four Ongoing Queer Novels 🌈🥳

✨The Trouble Next Door: Life without feelings sounds peaceful, until it isn't. Returning home after four years, Divya's calm, drama-free world flips upside down thanks to Shraddha, a Guju tenant who's a constant source of irritation. 

👑The Royal Queen: A royal queer marriage drama, just for you. A princess is raised as a Man, and the people of the kingdom pressure her to get married. What will happen when this princess ends up marrying another princess? This chaos will unfold on the land of Rajasthan, in the village within the palace's inner chambers, Antahpur.

💍Accidental Amore: If you're into a Queer Indian marriage drama, then Accidental Amore! is just for you-prepare for an emotional rollercoaster!

🙈Forbidden Crush: For those who love teen-adult spicy romance, Forbidden Crush! is your perfect match. This slow-burn story will keep you on the edge of your seat with its sizzling tension and sprinkle of humor.

Two Completed Queer Novels 🌈🥳

💫Sweet and Salty Love? Life's a mix of sweet chocolate moments and salty tear-filled ones. Devi's life took a salty turn the moment she met Devika and realized she is into girls. And with that, a storm of confusion and fear began to brew inside her.

🦄Extremely Slow Love: if you're a fan of First love romances, Extremely Slow Love! is the one for you. Dive into this college/school drama where a girl experiences her first love-slow, tender, and unforgettable.

title: Highway Kismet
description:
"Do you ever give being insufferable a rest? Don't you get tired of annoying me and then acting smug about it?" Mitchell annoyed asked the infuriating girl sitting across him. 

"Why do you always find a fault with everything I say or do? Could it be that I'm the first girl that isn't flustered around the infamous Mitchell Clarke?" Mila raised a brow. 

Mitchell, once again annoyed with the girl who's been taunting and teasing him for way too long abruptly stood up from his chair and made his way across the table to where she was seated, he placed one hand on the table and the other on the headrest of her chair and hovered over her, his face a mere centimeter away from hers. 

"Ooh turn on the air-conditioner things are about to get H.O.T - hot." Mila remarked as she fanned herself.

"Don't act invincible, I see you when I'm not looking, you're dying for me." He whispered

Mila shifted up in her seat and moved closer to him, she looked in his eyes and challenged, "If you're man enough, out that theory to the test and kiss me." 

Mitchell and Mila are complete opposites. They meet once on a very drunken which results in an attempted one night stand gone bad. Thereafter, they swear to forget it and each other. Fate however brings them together when their best friends take a decision to get married in Vegas. In order to stop them, Mila and Mitch reluctantly embark on a road trip which includes crazy shenanigans, pointless fights, awkward moments, and a whole lot of teasing which rises the sexual tension between these two nemeses. 

What happens when two nemeses have to spend seven long days together in the name of friendship? After literally pulling each other's hair, will they survive one week in a car and shared hotel rooms? Or will the saying 'A fine line between love and hatred' once again be proved?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"The person who sows a single beautiful thought in the mind of another renders the world a greater service than that rendered by all the faultfinders combined.".   ~Napoleon Hill 

Do something to make another smile and see how content you will feel seeing you were the reason for another's happiness. After all true happiness lies in the happiness of giving and not taking, selflessness is a greater quality than that of selfishness.

title: Corrupting the Good girl
description:
"So your go!" She said, smiling up at me brightly.

"Wait what?" I answered with a look of confusion playing upon my face.              

"Well I just poured my heart out to you..." Fran said cheekily with a wink. "Now it's your go, come 'on Beadle, out with it!" She said raising her eyebrows at me.

"Well what do you want me to say?" I asked blankly.

"Tell me why you sleep around and then break girls' hearts." She replied with the same perplexity as me, she then bowed her head down to rest on my chest again. She must have felt me tense next to her at her question so she lifted her head and our eyes met. She gave me a reassuring smile and I felt more at ease.

"Well it's pretty simple really." I said, pausing dramatically. "I break girl's hearts so that they can't break mine first." I answered expressionlessly.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 


Fran is your typical good girl. 

She studies hard. She's her father's favourite. She's never been drunk. She's neve had sex. She's never smoked.  

Fran's ideal Saturday night consists of staying in, drinking tea and reading John Green books however her simple and repetative existence is soon sent spiraling into chaos when a gorgeous plot twist leaps on to the page going by the name of Ethan Beadle. Or as he's otherwise known, her brother's best friend.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

title: Red Rover | gxg | Wattys 2023 Winner | ✔
description:
[Complete. Wattys 2023 Winner] The Redding takes you if it knows your name. That's the rule that's kept Meg alive --- or awake, rather --- since the night the world went to hell. Nobody knows where the red stuff came from, but it acts like water, it's in the water, and it falls as rain every night. The people it captures drop like puppets with their strings cut. They're asleep, not dead, and you can wake them if you say their name again. But then they just try to kill you.

Meg and the other survivors she's befriended think they've found a stable equilibrium, six weeks after the catastrophe began. Nicknames become real names, and Meg knows she's getting better at identifying safe houses. Her crush discovers that Morse code, like writing, is a safe way to say a Sleeper's name. It's the night after learning it that Meg wakes up just as the nightly rain is starting.

Raindrops, as it turns out, can make dots and dashes, too. The Redding can talk. 

And it's telling her to run. 

❖❖❖

Complete. Wattys 2023 Winner.

authorBio:
✣ ┅ ABOUT ┅ ✣

Wattys 2023 Winner
Multi-Featured Author
5x Wattys Shortlister
2x ONC Honourable Mention

You can call me August, but I will also be summoned by cool pond bugs and/or pictures of cats.

I'm a queer spec fic writer with a fondness for tossing characters into things they think they aren't prepared for. Most of my work is Dark Fantasy or Horror, but I cross paths with Sci-Fi, Paranormal, and Romance more often than not.

If my books have anything in common, it's wild settings, happy endings, casual rep, and kickass disaster queers being disasters but also kickass!

In the normal world, I work for the UN, wait on two cats, and keep Carassius and Corixidae in outdoor aquaria. I am five years old inside.

I wasn't kidding about the pond bugs.

title: VICE
description:
*THIS STORY IS UNDER COMPLETE RECONSTRUCTION.*



Prickly, sarcastic, self-aware Austin is roped into a risky dare by his best friend that leads to one of the most frustratingly eventful days of his young life. 

Not one for attention, Austin has preferred a quiet life within the otherwise chaotic and cruel confines of high school that is fueled by pubescent hormones and pointless drama. For years, he has maintained that normalcy until he wakes up one day to a whirlwind of misunderstandings that he can't take back that was caused by a mistake his sister made.

Within the misunderstandings, one new entity in his life --that is not by design of his own, springs up and somehow weasels his way into Austin's world.

Noah. 

Noah is a new boy in town whose mission in life seems to be centered around driving Austin mad! He himself is shrouded in mystery and, despite his queer mannerisms, something about him effortlessly pulls Austin to him as time goes by that even Austin's resistance cannot fight against.


It's an innate need for freedom and affection that connects them in an otherworldly manner; which becomes their saving grace as they battle both present and past demons on a quest to find happiness.

title: The Rhodes To Us
description:
❝I think you're my favorite person.❞

                                               - - -

Since childhood, Lila's had her mind set on what she wants. And now in her senior year, that's getting into West Michigan State University. But her overbearing parents are worried Lila is wasting away her teenage years. 

Chase Rhodes is on his way to West Michigan with a football scholarship. He's always been sure of that one constant in his life. But when his history grade begins to slip, things aren't going quite like he planned.

With the best history grade in their class, it only makes sense for Chase to seek out Lila's help. So they strike a deal: Lila tutors Chase on the subject of all things historical, and he helps her convince her parents that she is the normal teenager they want her to be. 

Shouldn't be too hard, right?

title: The Tempting Apple [COMPLETED]
description:
Melinda Beaumont is the girl at school who simply doesn't give a damn. The one who doesn't care what people think. With a bold personality and somewhat of a troublemaker, her life is fun and carefree. Just as she likes it.

So when the new "oh so hot" teacher walks in through the doors she thinks nothing of it. Sure, the dude is good looking but he's a teacher. A trigonometry one at that. Even the more reason to hate him. But what happens when a string of events bring the two together? Will her tough girl cover shield her from this new feeling she has inside? And most importantly, what will happen when their lives and secrets are threatened by someone who wants to tear them apart?

And as for Mr. D' Amato... What will he do about that tempting apple he can't get out of his mind?

title: Beat Of My Heart
description:
Holly Vickers didn't care about superstar Sebastian Jennings, she certainly never thought she'd ever meet him in person, either.  She was a normal seventeen year old girl in high school just looking for a fun night out to escape her hectic life and decided to go to a concert with her best friend. 

Little did she know her life would change the moment her eyes connected with worldwide superstar Sebastian Jennings-singer, actor and international heartthrob. 

Did Holly have what it took to make sure that Sebastian didn't rewrite the tune of her life to the beat of his heart?


***


We stared back at each other in a heat filled moment, and as I looked into his piercing green eyes I felt myself being lost in his stare. 

He licked his lips and leaned down towards my face, and I felt his breath fan across my cheeks as I saw him close his eyes, lips desperately close to my own. 

I was about to lean in and close my eyes as well until I heard a piercing scream run through the hallways.

"SEBASTIAN JENNINGS!"




***SATIRE!  READ AT YOUR OWN RISK***

"What do you mean by delivering my bodyguard?" Now I am totally confused.

title: My Name is Kara Zor-El....and I am SuperGirl
description:
"Have you ever felt like you just couldn't fit in?
      
      That no matter how hard you tired you just...didn't belong?
      
      Not the Justice League, Teen Titans, or even the Young Justice could make me feel like one of them.
      
      I mean, a darn Atlantian could fit into society better then me.
      
      Was there something wrong with me? Was I just too hopeless?"
      
      --Kara Zor-El
      
      A young alien girl finds out that being a normal human woman involves going through a lot of pain, regret, and heartache. That self acceptance is one of the most important human aspects to understand first. And she slowly comes to realize her difference it just whats makes her special after all.
  
  Plus she has a crush on Nightwing, so...that could only end well, right?

title: In Your Own Words
description:
!!! ATTENTION MALE STUDENTS OF BADER UNIVERSITY !!!

Are you a participant in the tradition of violent, albeit organized, sport? Are you a capable writer? If the answer to both of these questions is yes, then this opportunity is for you. Get paid to help one of your fellow students finish her debut novel. 

Golfers and video game players need not apply. 

*****

Weston Maguire is Bader University's star hockey player and an all-around good guy. Everyone knows him. 

Nobody knows Cassie Belford---not really. She's an aspiring novelist with a talent for making sure people don't stare long enough to see what she's hiding. 

But when Cassie places an ad for help with her book,
Wes is the guy best suited for the job. And before she knows it... he's seeing right through her.

Written through emails, text messages, diary entries and notes, In Your Own Words highlights the complexity of being vulnerable and the beauty of writing our own stories. 

In an honest depiction of friendship, love, and trauma, some subject matter could be triggering for readers. Content warnings are at the beginning of sensitive chapters. 

If you're looking for endearing characters, palpable chemistry, and original storytelling, look no further.
Tous Droits Réservés

A B O U T

in addition to writing, i read jfk biographies, study social work, and test my boyfriend's patience.

i like movies about sharks and songs from 2006. i don't like ketchup or carnations.

my writing aims to be as trauma informed and victim/survivor centric as possible; i recognize that this can be controversial and challenging to do so properly. i might get it wrong. should my writing contradict your lived experience, i would love to chat about it. my inbox is always open and i welcome any and all feedback.

title: A Young Heart's Promise
description:
Mikha has been inlove with Maloi since the first time they've met. She did everything on her will to make her fall for her. And she didn't fail! Maloi fell for her and it made her the happiest person on Earth. 

So she took that chance and secretly started to keep her long time promise for her, one by one. When she thought everything's falling into their perfect places, Maloi suddenly broke up with her and left her. Hindi man naging malinaw ang dahilan kung bakit siya iniwan ni Maloi, sobrang lalim naman ng sakit na idinulot nito sa kanyang puso. 

Makalipas nga ang tatlong taon, dumating na ang araw na pinakahihintay nya. Iyon ay ang muling pagtatagpo ng kanilang mga landas. This time instead of letting Maloi fall for her, she will take her revenge and make her suffer. At mukhang umaayon sa kanya ang tadhana dahil malaki ang pangangailan sa kanya ng babae.

Pero magagawa nga kaya ni Mikha na pasakitan si Maloi? Because eventhough Mikha's heart is now full of anguish and hatred towards Maloi she can't help herself to be drawn with her all over again.

title: Mated to my enemy
description:
"No no no no this can't be happening!" I say. 

"Dude chill, what's wrong?" asked Ben. 

"No she can't be why her, out of every girl there is of course had to be her, ugh!"

"Who?"

"Kingston! Kingston is my mate!"

"Daphne?"

"Yes! But I can just reject her right?"

"You're screwed"

"Wow thanks, you're such a big help!"




Daphne Kingston is an only child and lives with her dad. After her mom abandoned her, she's had to learn things for herself since her dad is always working so that he can put food on the table. So she has to deal with chores, school and above it all, her worst enemy, Arron Cole. 


Arron Cole is the "bad boy" at school. He does as he pleases. He is also a werewolf and will become alpha, once he turns 18, of the Crescent Moon Pack. He will also find his mate, which is none other than his enemy, Daphne Kingston. 


Will Daphne and Arron accept each other? How will Daphne react after Arron tells her he's a werewolf? Will they be able to put their differences aside and eventually fall in love? Read to find out!

title: Bridal Crises
description:
Ruthless, formidable and cold hearted, are the words people now used to describe the five sons of Pandu. 

The once compassionate and just souls, seemed to have lost their glow, and their places have shell of the men, they once were. 

Three years had been since Draupadi's death, and everything had changed. 

The joy of Hastinapur, and pandavas had abandoned them, pushing them in a darkness so thick, where there was no hope, just agony and her memories. 

Draupadi was dead, or so they thought. . .

Fate's wheel twists sharply, and the pandavas are once again face to face, with the woman they once thought dead. 

A miracle, it was. But, when had destiny been so simple? A twist awaits them, or maybe, a series of them. 

Secrets surround the young princess of Panchaal, that are fatal enough to kill, threatening to destroy the woman the pandavas so crazily love. 

Determined to protect her at every cost, the pandavas are ready to go to any measure. After all, she was the Pandavas' Panchaali, their one bride they loved with all they are, the very base of their existence. And god have mercy on anyone who threatened her. . .



KINDLY NOTE THE IMAGES USED IN THE BOOK AND IN COVER BELONGS TO THEIR ORIGINAL CREATORS, I HAVE TAKEN THE IMAGE FROM GOOGLE & PINTEREST) 
XOXO, 

Nick❤

authorBio:
RadheyPanchaali is a charmingly chaotic writer who believes that the best stories come from life's unexpected twists, spontaneous dance breaks, and late-night cravings for chai. When not lost in a world of fictional characters and plot twists, she can be found chasing her mischievous muse, who has an uncanny knack for vanishing whenever deadlines loom.

RadheyPanchaali has a soft spot for history and mythology, but she's equally passionate about sprinkling a little mischief into her writing-because why should heroes always play by the rules? Her tales are a delightful concoction of romance, intrigue, and the occasional showdown, best enjoyed with a side of laughter and a pinch of spice.

Rumor has it, she once wrote an entire chapter on a napkin during a dinner party. The napkin still hasn't forgiven her.

title: In Too Deep
description:
" hey ". I look up to see a tall guy, around my age. Dark brown hair, brown eyes. Wearing a jean jacket, jeans and a gray top with black running shoes.

" hey " I say.

" you seem lonely can a sit? " he smirks.

" sure " I smile.

The guy sits down across from me.

" I'm Grayson " he smiles

" Emily, nice to meet you Grayson " I smile.

This was the day my whole life changed.

••••

Emily Watson is your normal everyday trying to be a good girl, follows ever rule, always gets straight A's, but knows how to be funny and serious at the same time.

Grayson Dean is your normal everyday trying to be a bad boy, doesn't follow many rules, smokes, doesn't like school at all, parties, but still can be sweet and cocky at the same time.

These two complete opposite, yet have a common understanding. What will happened when they start fake dating??

••••

" Grayson? What are you doing here? how did you even get in here? " I asked as I clenched the towel around my body.

Grayson got up from my bed. " you know we should just break that deal we made " he said as he backed me into my door.

••••

title: The Bad Boy Stole My Diary
description:
"I love how innocent you act, but I know you're not."

****************************
My dad had given me a simple journal that I thought I'd never use. 
When I found out he died in a car crash, that next week, I decided to start writing all my feelings in it because I'm not really good at expressing them verbally. 
My journal was full of decent thoughts... Well some were decent, 
 
Until I met Dillon Taylor. He was the cocky, annoying, loud mouthed boy next door that wouldn't turn his music down if the queen of England walked in his room. 

So one night, I finished my diary entry and fell asleep. I left the window open because it was hot. Bad idea. I heard some fiddling in my room so I turned on my lamp. Only to see that annoying boy from next door's body was halfway out my room window-- with my diary in his hand.

title: Protecting the President's Son | ✔️
description:
[Highest Rank: #1 in Teen Fiction]
Luna Prescott is a young special agent and Ace Crawford is the President's son. On one eventful day, she gets given the undercover mission to protect the Ace from the 'danger' in Westside High. Will her physical and mental abilities be enough to keep him safe, let alone survive the torture they call high school?

***

We carried on walking through the amusement park until he pointed to a game, where you had to shoot down targets to win.

"I bet I will beat you in that." He grabbed my hand and lead me to it.

Little does he know.

"What do I get when I win?" I laughed.

"When? Pshhhh, I will get you a new motorcycle." 

I keep on forgetting how rich he is.

"That means I don't need to catch rides with you anymore," I grin, "Game on, loser."

He grabbed his water gun and shot at the cardboard targets and got down 15 out of 20 in the time he had.

"Your turn, cupcake" Ace handed me the water gun.

"Watch and learn, pretty boy." I grabbed the gun and aimed at the targets.

After my two minute go, I shot down 20 out of 20. I turned to him with a smug expression and his mouth hung open.


***

Luna Prescott is a 17 year old spy who has been working with the Agency for her whole life. Ever since her parents, former spies, had been found 'off the grid' on a mission when she was only 5, the agency took her and her brother in. She has ,since then, been training and going out to missions until her 17th birthday when she finds out what her most important mission of her life is.

Ace Crawford, a 17 year old typical bad boy and he is the president's son. This brings him threats from people who hate his father and dangers that he needs help protecting himself from.

title: The Art of Pretending
description:
•••

   This is a story about a girl. A girl who lied all too well. One who was bored, pretty, and sad. A girl who mastered the art of pretending.  Pretending since she was a little girl.

   The problem with playing pretend is that it gets boring. As a kid, you love it. But as you grow older, you grow tired of it. Not only that, you start to doubt what's pretend and what's not. 

   What's worse than a girl who lies all the time to others? A girl who lies to herself even more. Blair Knight, the queen of pretending to be something she's not. She's tired of pretending to be the perfect girl, she's tired of pretending she's fine with her boring life. She wants to escape it.

   And he helps her escape it. The boy. The school's most loved. The one who can see past the mask Blair keeps up. The one who is deeply in love with a girl. A girl who's love was toxic but strong, always pulling him back in. This girl isn't Blair.

   Blair wakes up with a feeling. A feeling that sparks ideas in her head. She wants a life of excitement, a life of regrets. And thanks to Grayson, she gets one. 

   But someone should of reminded Blair of the warning. Be careful what you wish for. Because Blair gets more regrets than she's bargain for. She started off hating Grayson. But you know what they say, there's a fine line between love and hate. And Blair? She likes to dances on it.

•••

description:
Alexandra Black has had everything  she's ever wanted all her life. New clothes, shoes, cars, you name it. But what will happen when something she doesn't want, gets handed to her? Feelings for a certain Sebastian Kingsley.

Sebastian Kingsley is the definition of bad boy. He's got the look, the style, the money, and has most definitely got the attitude. All his life he has also gotten whatever he may desire. Apart from one thing. Love. Sebastian Kingsley had never got any form of love or attention from his parents and in result has spiralled our of control.

What happens when his parents finally notice their son spiralling out of control and decide it's time to take charge? authorBio:
I solemnly swear I am upto no good.
After struggling through various pen names, I've finally settled (I think) for Aurora. So you guys can call me Aro! And no, I'm not some red-eyed psychopath from Twilight.
Now, about me. I am a part of multiple fandoms, my greatest Fandom being Harry Potter, closely followed by Percy Jackson.
Like most fangirls, I work overtime, and if I got paid for it, I would've bought a few Lamborghinies by now. I would like nothing better than to lock myself up with my innumerable number of books, phone, computer, diary, pen and iPod. (and of course, a charger) But I enjoy being with my friends too. I am a confusion, but you can try figuring me out. xD
Wattpad is an important part of my life. Though I haven't been here for more than a year, I have many amazing friends here. I honestly can't imagine my life without Wattpad or my Wattpad friends now.
I like to cuddle up to my pillows and blanket. You may find me in the depths of my blankets, maybe earphones plugged in, or reading a book with my phone's flashlight.
Please PM me if you want me to read your book. I won't mind.
I will really appreciate if you check out my books-
Back In The Time:A Ginny Weasley/ Marauder  Fanfic and
After The Darkness:A Time Travel Fanfic (Marauder Era).
I am planning to make other books too, but I'm not sure about them, yet.
You can write any fanfiction. Whether your OC is Harry's or Ron's or Hermione's or Katniss's or Peeta's twin sister or a long lost daughter of Sirius Black or Remus Lupin or Haymitch doesn't matter, as long as the OC isn't a Mary Sue.
My favourite twin is George Weasley, while my favourite Marauder is Remus Lupin aka Moony.
That would be all for now. No wait.

title: Three Words, I Love You ✔️
description:
Adaline Wolk is very easy to get along with. 

She's kind, funny, goofy... maybe a little awkward here and there. She's got a heart bigger than her body. Once she warms up to someone, she'll talk like they're buddies. But since she's been teased by her fellow classmates, she's very selective about who she actually befriends.

Adaline will be kind to anybody, no matter who they are or what they do. 

Even if they're in the form of the six-foot tall jerk named Nemo Kademan. 

Nemo Kademan is known to be a bit... rude. Still, everyone likes and adores him. And only he knows the real reason as to why he acts the way he does, and says the things he says. His friends aren't the best influence either. 

Nemo has been stuck in this negative mindset for so long that he's losing himself. 

Until he meets Adaline and finds out she isn't all that bad, and ultimately... finds himself.

title: He's My Best Friend ✔
description:
Sabrina was an average Florida girl just trying to survive her senior year. Being best friends with the bad boy, Lucas- who happens to be her crush since middle school- she had no idea what was coming. When she confesses her feelings for her best friend, it leads to jealousy, violence, mistakes, tears and...love. Will confessing her feelings for Lucas tear them apart? Does the bad boy have a soft side?

People aren't what they seem. You can put on an act but still be a completely different person when you're alone. Lucas wasn't a completely different person than people thought he was, he just needed someone to push him in the right direction. Could that someone be Sabrina?

"Because of you....I know what real love is."

title: Clean Slate
description:
Amber said, "I love this story! It was so much fun to torment poor Kurt. He's so earnest and good hearted."

Poor Kurt. He bumped his head and can't remember a darn thing. Not even that he's a wannabe woman by the name of Marcie. Luckily, she has her roommates Daphne and Chloe to jog his memory. There's the Chelsea apartment, the China Doll nightclub, and the Drag-Go-Rama restaurant. Funny thing is none of this feels familiar Marcie. Laugh and cry some with the winsome threesome as they transition from lads to ladies in the brilliant new comedy "Clean Slate" from the pen of Amber Walker.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am Amber Walker, a transwoman on the road to her authentic-self.

Before my M2F, my thoughts echoed, "Be a woman!", "You useless coward!", and "You should kill yourself!" And why not? I knew what I wanted, but fear silenced me. So, I betrayed my genuine-self and lived a half-life. To know me, you need to know that I grew up when an odd boy begged society's harsh and relentless discipline.

To free myself, I recast my fantasies as fiction. Some speak of how society instilled self-loathing in my every atom. And how I misguidedly chose self-abnegation and pleasing everyone but myself. Others speak about the joy of self discovery,  transition, and fulfillment.

I gained understanding through the writing; may you gain the same in the reading.

title: Seeing Red [✓]
description:
Book One [completed] 
Every year since his 2nd birthday, Ashley, Ash for short, has been losing the ability to see colors. Yellow on his ninth birthday, Violet on his 13th, Pink last year and so on and so on, like clockwork.
    
    
    
    Defeated and taking care of his cancer-stricken cat, diabetic mother, and caught in an never-ending job, he finally gets the chance to be an actual journalist, but he must first pass the interview with the billionaire CEO wearing the burning red suit.
    
    Reece Red, the new, young and wild CEO of R.E.D. NEWS CORP, a right-wing, republican and conservative news organization, is about as confused as anyone his age about how this thing works. When he sees Ash the first time, who challenges the him on his credentials, he instantly hates him. 
    
    But they end up finding that they need each other in more ways than one.

authorBio:
Hi, I'm Kris, I'm 24, I'm black, and I write things sometimes.

College Kid by day.
Sleeping by Afternoon.
Awkward Superhero by Night.

Despite popular (and certainly  reasonable) belief, I am indeed male and the gayest straight one you might just ever meet. My friends say that I just haven't realized I like guys yet and he'll come soon and so I spend my nights waiting for Dylan O'Brien to climb through my window to read Jane Austen books to me. [update: turns out I'm gay as fuck]

I have a very noticeable writing style that usually involves pop culture references, idiot boys, twists and turns on all sides and gooey, boderline cheestastic dialogue.

Most of my books are cute, humorous love stories that celebrate clichés by twisting them in on themselves. You may projectile vomit from all the fluff. But like, fun projectile vomit.

I'm disgustingly nice, incredibly forgetful, extraordinarily lazy and inhumanly aloof. I also enjoy the occasional adverb.

I'm currently in college studying for a degree in Procrastination. I have the potential to go for the Masters I'm sure.

I'm  highly undependable but I try.

title: Romeo and Romeo
description:
Levi wasn't the kind of guy to go around kissing strangers, least of all the insufferable princes these events tended to attract. But something about Prince Charles made him feel a little stupid -- almost stupid enough to believe in love at first sight.

~~~

When Levi, the youngest prince of Arthur Island, is forced by his parents to attend a performative "good relations" ball in their rival country, he can't wait for the night to end. That is, until he meets Prince Charles, the charming heir to the Elizabethan throne. Love is in the air, so palpable they can't seem to escape it no matter how hard they try. As if navigating seventeen-year-old emotions isn't hard enough already, their families drop a bomb that will only make it harder:

In the name of permanent peace, Prince Charles is to marry Arthur's youngest royal.

No, not Levi. His twin sister, Amelia.

title: The Path Back to You | Levi x OC
description:
"Reveal yourself," Erwin ordered, though Mikasa detected uncertainty in the commander's voice. 
It was almost as though he were afraid of who lay beneath the cloak. The entire regiment held its breath as the rider reached up with pale hands and lowered their hood. 
For a moment, there was only silence.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Left outside the walls during an Expedition, Anastasya 'Anya' Morozova should have died long ago. Always one to defy the odds, the once-formidable captain is determined to cling to life long enough to find her way back to those she loves, battling against Titans, the elements, and fate itself in order to do so, as she seeks out the sanctuary of the very walls she was once so desperate to escape. 

However, back within the cramped world of the walls, will things ever be the same again for Anastasya, Levi, Erwin and the others? Or will the hearts they all thought they'd hardened finally begin to crack in the face of tragedy?



IMPORTANT
This is an Attack on Titan/Shingeki no Kyojin fanfiction. The original manga publication was created by Hajime Isayama. I therefore do not own the majority of the characters, main storylines, or locations, and have kept some dialogue and scenarios the same as they are in the original in order to make the story work better and to keep characters consistent - after all, it's hard to change perfection! Please be wary of spoilers from all seasons of the anime.

I do own the main character (Anastasya Morozova) and other original characters, scenes etc. and these are under copyright protection. Please do not use them.

This fanfiction was written purely for enjoyment to add to and embellish a universe I truly love, and to improve my writing and character development.

If you enjoy this story, please check out the original manga and the anime!

title: Love Is...
description:
"Love is..." I explored my brain to find the most suitable word in my dictionary that could fit in the definition I was trying to say; the definition that could make the jerk, sitting opposite me with a smirk on his face, believe in 'love'.

"Bullshit?" He offered with a huge arrogant smirk on his face and no matter how much I agreed with him on this particular matter, I couldn't agree. So, instead of nodding my head in agreement, I scowled at him. His smirk grew bigger and he leaned away from me, gazing at me with his piercing grey eyes. "Finding it hard to make me believe in love when you yourself don't believe in that shit, huh?"

With his piercing grey gaze fixed on my every move, I realized that 'being the devil's cupid' was going to be a lot tougher than I had initially thought.

(By the author of 'And We Meet Again')
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Military's Girl (editing)(1-7 edited)
description:
I pushed away from the dinner table and stood up really fast, then bolted for the door. I couldn't just stay here and listen to him tell me he was leaving, I just couldn't deal with it. Tears start running down my face just as I reach the edge of the grass and sidewalk about to enter the street, but arms wrapped around my waist and I collapsed into them."Baby girl, I'm so sorry." He sounded as heartbroken as I am "I really am, I wanted to tell you first. Before I had to tell very one like that, I don't want you crying like this. It breaks my heart."
"I still remember the time I lost you in the woods."
"You had no idea how scared I was because I lost you. I thought I lost you for good, that I wouldn't be able to find you, ever." I leaned my head into his chest."Every time I called your name I got more scared that I wouldn't find you, but then I did. I found you. You were huddled up crying against a tree trunk, you didn't even know it was me till I called your name.''
"The way you looked at me after that, made me want to never see you cry again. So I promised myself I would do everything in my power to keep you from crying, and I did a good job. Until now, that is. Not only did I not keep you from crying, but I'm the reason." he says, his voice barely above a whisper. His eyes shining with tears.

"You also promised never to leave me." I whisper as I'm finally able to talk, my lips quivering.
"I know..."
"You promised!" I shout, he holds me tighter.
"I know... I know, and I'm sorry. I never meant to break that promise either."

~

Tyler and Dakota have been best friends since either can remember, even with a 2 year gap in their age.
But what happens when Ty leaves and joins the military, and leaves Kota behind? Something he promised he would never do? Will it wreck their friendship for good, will they be able to repair it?
When Ty comes back, Kota is in a terrible situation. Will Ty be able to protect her?

© 2013 Kenzie Elaine (Wattys13)

title: COLLISION AT FIRST SPILL
description:
Samantha Harper,a chemistry freshman with a boundless energy, never expected her first day of college to go like this. A small misstep and a cup of coffee later, she finds herself in a messy disaster, dousing the stoic and aloof Alex Reid, a physics student, who couldn't be more different from her. What starts as a chaotic encounter soon unravels into an unexpected connection between two very different worlds.

As Sam's attempts to apologize grow more creative and a little more chaotic she finds herself drawn to the one person who seems immune to her charm.Will her relentless persistence break through Alex's icy exterior,or will Sam learn that not all equations can be solved?

title: It Takes Two(boyxboy)
description:
Levi Jackson has been in love with Gage Zachary since freshman year, and hasn't failed to tell him everyday he can. Gage rejects him time after time, but is secretly dying to make Levi his and his alone. When something tragic occurs, Levi isn't the same person. For the first time, Gage pursues Levi in an attempt to get to find out what happened to the boy he loves. Will Gage end up confessing to Levi in order to help fix him, or will Levi suffer in silence forever? (Points of view will alternate throughout the story)

title: Ice Age: The Misfit Herd
description:
Jade was a lone saber that had been by herself ever since she left her pack, three years ago. You could say trust issues was something that the young saber had. One day while moving South she meets the herd: Manny, Sid, and Diego. Soon after learning they are taking a human baby--Roshan--back to his family, she joins the trio to help them get him back. Jade decided that once the baby was back home, she would go back to being the lone saber she once was. However, the longer she hangs around the three mammals, the more she finds herself becoming attached to them and seeing them like they were her own family.

title: Bookworms | ✔
description:
Bibliophile - a person who collects or has a great love of books. 

* * * *

Nicholas loves to read. It is his passion, his source of air, his world. He'd lose himself among the pages of an alternate reality. It is his daily routine, so getting a job at the library is the next best thing. The problem? Well, Nicholas doesn't know except for the fact that he's never happy. Without books, he'd never feel anything. 

That is until one fateful day he meets a girl who is willing to show him what it really feels like to be happy. Not just any girl, but a fandom obsessed Muslim girl.

title: Until I make you Mine
description:
• TEASER •

Abhimanyu's forced marriage to Arantrika was meant to be nothing more than a duty, but soon, his heart is captured by her in ways he never expected. He falls deeply in love, knowing that she is the only one who will ever occupy his heart. But Arantrika, though aware of his love, is uncertain of her own feelings. She doesn't love anyone else, but her heart remains conflicted. Though she values Abhimanyu, she's unsure whether she can return the love he so freely gives.

Throughout it all, Arantrika's best friend, Kabir, stands by her side, his affection for her hidden in silence.
His love was always one sided for her as he thought she was happily married with her husband but does he know that she isn't really happy in that marriage?

But Arantrika never sees him as anything more than a friend.
 As emotions swirl and confusion clouds her heart, Arantrika must come to terms with her feelings, torn between the man who loves her and the loyalty she feels in his love.


Will she ever fully embrace Abhimanyu's love? Or will the confusion continue to haunt her, leaving both men trapped in the shadows of unspoken emotions?

Will she ever know her bestfriend loved her just like her forcefully married husband did?




trope:- enemies to lovers / he fell first, she fell Harder / love triangle / billionaire romance / slow burn.

title: Virgin Lips
description:
Joanna Brooks had her life all planned. She'd have graduated in time, got a great job, had a successful career. In the middle there would have been a relationship or two maybe, but by the age of 25, she'd have been happily in a stable relationship, working for a well known newspaper as journalist.
She'd have never guessed, when she was 12, that none of these plans would work out.

28 years old, stuck with a crappy job and no love life whatsoever.  Future seemed as bleakas ever. With two new kittens, Joanna was readying herself to start her life as crazy cat lady...but her new neighbor, handsome and lovely photographer Ben Harris, doesn't seem to think it that way, as he gets ready to revolutionize her whole existence.
Trouble is, his own life is not as crystal clear as he pretends it is.

Add two pervasive friends determined to close the chapter in Joanna's life called "virginity" by hooking her up with their cute brother, plus an unsettling return, and you get Joanna's adventure of a lifetime.

DISCLAIMER
This story is intended for all those girls that have troubles seeing themselves as the beautiful beings they are.
This is for you, beautiful girls. Be yourself. Don't be ashamed of you are. Just embrace your own unique nature. Be chubby, skinny, shy, introvert, extrovert, weird, crazy, lovely...whatever it is, just BE YOURSELF.

title: Two Gangs and a Golden Girl
description:
"I didn't ask to be in the middle of your ego-battle," I grumble.

Blake pins me to my locker, hands resting on either side of my head. "Well, you got it in anyway, Darling," he whispers. His face is inches away from mine and damn me for licking my lips.

I am NOT falling for these guys. 

And then, at the corner of my eye I spot Owen and his gang approaching.

Well, that's just great.

***

The West and East gang of Tygerwell have been at each other's throats since the dawn of time. And the two leaders of these gangs want to end the fight, once and for all.

But fighting with fists is easy. Fighting with wit and charm, is a whole other ball game.

Blake. West-side gang leader. Leather jacket and killer glare. Don't talk back.

Owen. East-side gang leader. Fancy coat and toxic stare. Don't resist.

And in comes Amber. Hair of gold and oceans in her eyes. Has too much sass for her own good and always, ALWAYS, manages to get into the middle of trouble. 

But these boys have no idea who they're really dealing with. And when Amber descovers she knows a little too much when it comes to guns and fighting, she has to question everything she thought she knew about herself. 

Three can play this game.

***

"Let's settle this. You got rejected, I got rejected. It's only fair that the fate of the gangs be on who gets the girl first."

"That sounds rather good, Rhodes. I'll take that bet on the golden girl."

***

COMPLETED

title: Pause (Published)
description:
#1 Humor 
                                                                   P A U S E
    
                 'Moments of hesitation make us human.' ~ Aqueela Lawson
    
                          'Moments of hesitation make us weak.' ~ Jay Taylor
    
                                                                          *~**~*
    
    Aqueela, a dreamer and comedian at heart, has just one joyous vision - to transform lives through the mere power of friendship, friendships so solid that they last a lifetime.
    
    However, Jay, pessimistic by nature, is convinced that friends are overrated, and that Aqueela is nothing short of a whackjob with an idealistic perspective on the world. It would seem that he wants nothing to do with her.
    
    Nonetheless, blood isn't always thicker than water. Friends can become your family. And so as one after the other begin to share in Aqueela's vision, Jay has no choice but to bend his own views in order to see the world through her eyes.
    
    Join Aqueela, and said family, on many adventures that are bound to leave you laughing, gasping for breath, as they discover the true meaning of friendship together in one single pause on life.

title: Falling For You  | ✓
description:
#1 in Romance - 07.01.2021

Forced to be around each other because their best friends just happen to love each other, Nicole and Blake must learn to be civil with one another for their sakes. 

However, being civil might be asking too much of the two of them - when the word didn't really exist in either of their vocabulary. 

She's a loudmouth, no filter whatsoever when she speaks and hates egoistic men. He's childish, also has no filter - especially when flirting - and oozes confidence like it's his birthright. 

They were so similar and yet so different, but oddly perfect for each other. Mostly, they were really just a recipe for disaster. 

This is the story of their turbulent journey.

title: HIT WICKET MY HEART **COMPLETE**
description:
Arnav is rakishly handsome and a world famous cricketer, the vice-captain of the Indian cricket team,and Khushi is an indian girl next door from Cape Town, who is fighting her way through the adversities of life, after the fateful plane crash that killed her family and turned her world upside down.

In the gameboard of Destiny, by a sudden unexpected roll of a dice, a chance encounter, in a small coffee shop in the busy streets of Cape Town, results in a conversation that leads to an instant connection in between off Arnav and Khushi; and  their different worlds and Life converge into a common point for that little short while.

Will their connection last through the lanes of virtual online conversations that follow post their meet, and be able to transcend into something special in the reality of the lives????

Their worlds are staunchly apart, and their lives don't have any common point of convergence, but will they have the courage to carve out a path towards each other and realise that sometimes, all that matters is the Love that has the power to - Hit Wicket the Heart!!!

authorBio:
Hello Everyone

My name is Prachi.A very warm welcome to all of you to My Mystical Tales on my Page Life Drama& Some Fictions on Wattpad.😊😊

Writing is my favorite Hobby. It's my 'Avocational' Passion and is so very close to my Heart, and it makes me very Happy, and that for me is the essence of it all. It is a precious emotion and a valuable form of expression for me, through which I want to express out my imagination and thoughts.🤗

Over time, I have explored different themes and journeys to the Good Old Destination of Love through various different plot settings in my fictions.

Personally, as an Individual as I went through the pregnancy/maternal/work phases, I realized that so very often, we women tend to pause on exploring our hobbies and passions, ducking them in the backseat as we get caught up with kids, family, work at both home/ office, by default. And after taking a bit of a gap myself ,one fine day, I sat there thinking to myself  that the busy cycle of Life will keep going on and I then realized that maybe it's on us as individuals to make an effort to accommodate time (in every little way that we can) to continue with the exploration into each of our avocational passions that could be close to our Hearts. And since then, I do fend out some time for myself each day to Write. 👩💻🤗

Apart from my love for Words & Love Stories, I also love listening to Music, Dancing,(I am a graduate in the classical dance form of Kathak), travelling and learning about diversity across our country and the world in terms of the various cultures, traditions, food etc.

I am an optimistic, cheerful and a happy go lucky person, who believes in finding out ways to scan out Positivity in every Situation that comes my Way. Also yes- You will Find Happy Endings  in the Love Stories I weave because that is exactly what I love to write🤗😊I hope you enjoy investing your precious time in my work.

title: Opposites Attract
description:
[Highest ranked #1 in Amourshipping]

"Everyone have their own love story, they just need a little push to get it going."

There's Serena Yvonne, the top student in Pokémon High. Known as "Miss Perfect" by every student around the school. Responsible, modest, reliable-she was basically everyone's' ideal role model. She has everything someone could ever want. But she's missing something.

Something important.

Love, perhaps?

Then there's Ash Ketchum, well known as the school's heart throb. His careless, nonchalant, river-like personality lets him get away with almost anything. Despite being chased by girls everyday, Ash only thinks of romance as an entertainment and has no intention of getting serious with it.

Realistically speaking, the two doesn't have much to say to each other. And the percentage of the two falling in love with each other is a close zero, but this is where fate comes in.  And as they all say...

Opposites attract!

---------------------------------

Disclaimer: I don't own Pokémon or any of the characters in this story

title: The Volleyball Girl and The Player?
description:
"There is no way in hell that i would ever sleep with you,"

"I would rock your world," Hunter says and grins as he scans my body up and down.
 Our story begins with a small school and a kindergarten class of only 15 kids in it. It also begins with a little girl and boy. Meet Raya and Hunter. As soon as they met each other they knew that they hated each other.
 Now, as seniors they still extremely dislike each other. Raya, with her fast wit and sarcasm, hates Hunter and everything about him. 
  Hunter, with his charming good looks and arrogance, loves making Raya look stupid and he loves pulling pranks on her.
 So, when Hunter's friends dare him to make Raya fall in love with him, he gladly accepts the challenge. But when he starts having feelings for her, will he be able to hide the face that he only started dating her on a bet?

title: The Curse of Pestilence Marr
description:
1ST in #GOTHICHORROR (Jan 2025). 2ND IN #GOTHICROMANCE (Dec 2024). 

The sorcerer Pestilence Marr is cursed. Every time he's overwhelmed by emotion, he unleashes a miasma that kills everyone in the surroundings. But when Princess Eleanor knocks at his castle gate, everything changes. Pestilence falls in love with her and, for the first time, the true nature of his curse appears clear to him.

But things never go as hoped for Pestilence. Eleanor leaves, so he sets out on a journey to find her. What he doesn't imagine is that his quest will lead him to confront an emotion he never expected: hatred. Only by experiencing true hatred, it turns out, can Pestilence break the curse that has bound him for so long.

The story is told like a fairytale. A very dark one, for that matter. Will Pestilence eventually get his "happily ever after"? 

---

Despite being my everyday language, English still isn't my mother tongue. I translated this story from Italian with the help of DeepL and Copilot, and curated the rough translation myself.

Through a social media post, one of the most well-known singers, Taylor Swift, meets the vocalist of a relatively unknown band named XIII (Thirteen), Xio.

What occurs if Xio tries to send Taylor a DM after realizing that she is actually interested in her? or, as put by the media, "Taylor Swift is now the new target of the infamous womanizer, Xio. Will this unexpected love last?"

title: Chameleon In New York
description:
Sydney has managed to rebuild her life from the ashes and forge one that is filled with secrets and half-truths.  She has given up hope of ever finding someone who would see her for who she really is - not the daughter of the man responsible for destroying countless lives.  So why is she so affected by the one man who has tarred her with the same brush as her father?

Ethan McMasters only has time in his life for one thing: Work.   After a chance encounter, he find himself drawn to a woman he is convinced is as crooked as the man who sired her.  There's something about the elusive and feisty woman that has him determined to uncover the enigma that surrounds her like a veil.

But in unlocking her secrets, will he discover more than he bargained for?

title: I Too Had An Unrequited Love Story
description:
Veronica Ray, youngest child of Ray family. She is the sweetest and the naughtiest darling daughter of Mr.  and Mrs. Ray. Veronica belongs to a above average family and has a ambition to start a business on her own. She is a independent girl living her life on her condition. 
  
  She has a past, which only her family knows. She may seem easy fun going, but in real she a very difficult person who doesn't trust anyone other than her family. She is a person with lots of secrets.
  
  But when she meets Arek Alden, the famous business tycoon of New York, her life turns upside down.
  
  Arek Alden, eldest son of Mr. and Mrs. Alden. He is known in the business world for his arrogance and ruthlessness. Everything in his life is a business deal for him. He turns table for his benefits and doesn't see a person emotions crushing in between because of him. He is the most cold hearted emotionless person one can meet when it comes to business. He also has a past, a secret that only he and his parents know. 
  
  But when he meets Veronica, his life becomes  full of mystery too. Everything surrounding her is a mystery for him to solve. He keeps himself getting involved into it.
  
  What happens when a relationship turns into a business deal just for the sake of the family.

title: The Puppy Project
description:
"Give me my puppy!" I demanded, my eyes ablazed with fiery anger.

"Correction, it's not your puppy. It's our puppy," He smiled, but it was anything but sweet nor happy.

"You know what? Damn you! You're nothing but a cold, emotionless, and heartless bad boy!" I sneered, glaring at him fiercely.

He chuckled at my words, taking a step closer to me. He slammed his hand unto the wall, trapping me, before leaning in close. 

"You got that right sweetheart but I think you got one thing wrong." He said, his eyes piercing straight into mine.

"And what is that?" I managed to asked, my throat seeming to get drier the more he looked at me.

"I'm neither one of those when I'm with you," and with those words, slammed his lips into mine.

title: Renee's River | √
description:
"Does he know your name?"

"Nope," I shook my head. "But hey, it was like love at first sight," I said dreamily before snapping back to reality and looking at my best friend who gave me a weird look. 

"You have to help me," I said.

"We're not going to the clothes store with me disguised as a girl again."

"No," I groaned. "I want you to help me get him to notice me."

My best friend's mouth opened then closed again before his eyes dropped to my boobs, "I mean, we can always start with that."

"What? No!" I crossed my arms over my chest while he laughed like the idiot he was and I rolled my eyes, then let out a breath, "Come on, just do this for your Firefly."

                         ▬▬▬▬▬

There was only one reason Renée McCann enjoyed her job at the bakery. To see the guy who had made her stomach flutter at the first sight.

Bulma wondered what it was for but whenever she asked, vegeta would just grunt or scoff at her and walk away ignoring her. But she can clearly see he has been acting strange.






I do not own the characters in this story only the story itself as I wrote it. The rightful owners are Akira Toriyama, Fuji tv, FUNimation, and Toei animation. This is a non-profit fanfiction of malexmale.

title: My Best Friend's Brother
description:
"Nice try," I said and the smile on his face grew wider. My eyes took in every inch of his face with pleasure. I continued, "But you've got to try better than that to impress me."

A soft laugh escaped his lips. "Who said I was trying to impress you?"

I racked through my brain to think for a smart answer and replied, "Who said you were not trying to impress me?"

*
Moving to a new place isn't the easiest thing to do. 
It's even harder when you know you're going to move often, as Ashley Mathews did.

Ashley Mathews, living with her mother, is quite an attractive girl with dark hair and green eyes. 
However, moving this time doesn't seem too bad when she's reunited with her ex-best friend Erica.  

Though, will things still remain great after she meets her best friend's flirty yet gorgeous brother, Ethan Wilson? 

Read to find out!

Friends. Family. Love. All in one. 

© Copyright by TryTillYouSucceed | 2013

Check out The Valentine's Note!
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello :)

I discovered Wattpad in the late 2011's and ever since then, I've been in love with this site. I was a silent reader for the first few years and then I started writing.
I'm also an ex-ambassador and it was, in one word, amazing.

I'm a hopeless romantic, who is way too emotional. Music is something that keeps my life going- I love Indie, Folk or basically any meaningful songs which are preferably slow and gentle.

I started writing when I was 14 and I've come a long way since then and it's just something that I enjoy doing very much. I can always make up a perfect love story with it's own ups and downs without having to actually experience all the sadness and heartbreak in real life. Sounds pretty cool to me.

As a writer, I obviously love reading too. Sarah Dessen, Cassandra Clare, J.K. Rowling,  Nicholas Sparks and Suzanne Collins are some of my favourite authors.
I'm a huge Potterhead and I absolutely love the Hunger Games series and basically every single book written by Cassandra Clare and Sarah Dessen.
Just One Day and The Last Song are two stand-alone novels that I love way toooo much. There's just something about these books that I could connect to. They're perfect.

If you read some of my stuff, I hope you enjoy and thank you for you taking the time to do so.
Feel free to message any time! :)

title: My Girl
description:
You see, It all started in a library. 

Mia Hastings always seems to get in trouble from her cocky and sarcastic attitude. So when Aiden Cash presents himself, she knows everything there is to know about him.  Well or so she thinks. When the hottie heart throb get's an unlikely interest in Mia, she knows how to deal with his cocky, rude, and sarcastic manners. How hard can a bad boy be? 

The only problem is Sterling Parker, her brothers best friend. Mia has had a crush on forever and thinks he might be the one. When suddenly he takes an interest, Mia can't believe her luck. So when two guys enter her life at the same time, she has to choose which one is the one to be hers. 
 
Everything is fair  in love and war.  Or so they say. But what Mia doesn't know is secrets can make or break someone. And falling in love has never been so dangerous.

Josh was a little badass. Barely, passable grades, rude additude, tattoos, piercings, and a wall built so hard, not even Miley Cyrus's wrecking ball could tear it down.

title: The Preston Playboys
description:
I think that sometimes the universe likes to play sick jokes on people.

Like sometimes you drop the ice cream you've been craving on the floor before you're able to get a bite or you crack the screen of your brand new cell phone. 

Or sometimes you get the first detention of your life on the same day your middle school bully comes back from a delinquent school and get locked in the library with him and his brothers (who you haven't talked to since the 8th grade.) 

Yep. The universe just loved playing sick jokes on Thea Caruso.

~~~

Thea Caruso had spent her entire childhood with her 2 best friends Kevin & Devin Preston but like every young friendship it slowly got to the point where they wouldn't even acknowledge each other in school.

She didn't hold anything against them. It's just how things go.

Strangers to Friends to Best Friends to Strangers.

There is one Preston that she does have ill feelings for. Marc Preston. The troublesome younger triplet that had always made Thea's life a living hell and he's back and ready to start his reign of terror. There's only one problem...

Thea Caruso isn't the same girl he picked on in 8th grade. She isn't scared to bite back now.

{ Book 4 of The Preston Series }

title: Lost Destinies
description:
Welcome to Fairytaletopia, where everything is happily ever after... until it isn't. Most people either loathe the idea of or don't believe in the legend of the Writer, a mysterious being in a faraway tower who writes the life story of every person who has ever lived with an enchanted pen. When an alliance of rogue mages decides to rise up against their destinies and take back power from the lazy, complacent royals ruling over the land, they don't realize what they've bargained for. An ancient curse is awakened by the death of Queen Snow White, and the gang of thieves robbing the Snow palace on the day she is killed become entangled in her destiny, changing theirs forever.

Ramona Swan and her crew, fairytale misfits barely scraping by in an old van and stealing to live, find themselves swept up into a life they never asked for ⸻ discovering the Writer is real and that he needs them to save the world. They chase through dangerous forests, battle monsters, and brave raging seas in a race against time to stop the newly emerged Alliance of Darkness from shattering the most famous fairy tales of all time, tearing down everything Fairytaletopia stands for in the process. The Alliance is brimming with wavering loyalties and sides bound to split, but their goal is set, and they'll do everything in their power to achieve it. Little do they know the royals won't go down without a fight.

The thieves never asked to be caught up in all of this, but no one ever can truly predict what fate has in store. They're fighting for something they've never believed in before and questioning everything they've ever known. Along the way they'll learn what family truly is... and forge their own destinies, together.






✹ GLORIOUS AWARDS 2023 WINNER: Action/Adventure, 1st Place.
✹ THE BOOK AWARDS 2023 WINNER: Action/Adventure, 3rd Place.

title: 𝐌𝐈𝐑𝐙𝐀
description:
"Aap agar soch rahe hai, mujhse nikah karne ke baad aap meri zindagi ke hero ban jaoge aur main aap ki ho jaungi toh aap badi ghalat fehmi mein hai, Mirza."

Her words ceased his steps. His fingers curled into a fist, trying to control his rage which was bubbling inside him by hearing her disobedient tone. He blew out a puff of air and slowly turned around with an emotionless face.

"That's where you are wrong, Hoor. I don't intend to be your hero because I'm not one."

He sauntered towards her, making her take several steps back in dread until her frame crashed to the wall. 

Altan leaned down to her height and placed his hand at her sides, caging her fragile state. Mahoor turned her face away and pushed herself more into the wall. Her left hand started to shiver uncontrollably on which his gaze fell.

Taking her trembling hand in his, Altan whispered,"Mai har kahani ka villain hi raha hu aur yeh kahani bhi koi alag nahi hogi. Tum apni ijazat se ha kahogi toh khushi hogi nahi bhi razi hogi toh koi baat nahi," his lips curled into a wicked smile, seeing tears gathered in her eyes. "Altan Mirza, har cheez apni bana hi leta hai aur tum toh meri tab hi ho chuki thi jab pehli dafa meri nazarein tumse mili thi."

title: Ellie is Cool Now
description:
Ellie Jenkins is struggling to write a high school TV show, so her boss gives her an ultimatum: go to her ten year reunion or lose her big break forever..
 
                                                                      *****
 
Ellie Jenkins definitely didn't peak in high school. She was an outsider, an invisible girl with a desperate crush on Mark Wright, a guy who hardly knew her name. But ten years later, she's living in Los Angeles, trying to write a hit show about cool high school kids, when an invitation for her high school reunion arrives. She doesn't want to go, but her writing has been suffering and her boss makes her an ultimatum: go to this reunion or lose her big break forever. Her boss even gives her a list of challenges to complete! Ellie takes the bait and returns to the school determined to find friends, fun and to prove to Mark Wright, once and for all, that Ellie is cool now.
