title: I'll Protect You (Re-Edit #2, 2016)
description:
Whoever wished they could live the life of royalty deserved a punch in the face. 
  
  Meet Park Sparrow, a feisty, sarcastic, and reckless outcast who's just a small-town girl, living in a lonely world. With an attitude and personality that gets her in more trouble than anything, she's a wild splash of color in the otherwise monotone and regal life of the academy she attends. 
  
  But there's more than meets the eye. Park isn't a random nobody in a town only famous for a school. Park Sparrow is the princess of Cimeria, and heir to one of the last remaining monarchies in the entire world. Unluckily for her, being an heir also means having a target painted on her back day and night. 
  
  Park is determined to find out who's behind the attempts on her life. With the unlikely help of Logan Cross, a boy she's hated since the dawn of time, the two must learn how to put aside their differences and get along because Park is in grave danger.
  
  As they work together to put together the mystery of who wants Park's throne, they must face new complications and obstacles that will be much more difficult than just a school yard grudge.
  
  (Book One of The Royalty Series)

title: The One Who Got Away is Back
description:
Formerly known as Edge of Romance / Three times is the charm, they say. But Addy needs more like a miracle if she's to have any hope with Miguel.

***

The only love Addy has ever known is for fashion. Her rich parents were too busy fighting each other to give her any. When they finally decide to divorce, it's Addy who ends up paying the price.

All Miguel has ever known is love: for his lost mother, his unruly sister and his workaholic, millionaire father. Yet, he feels like he hasn't done enough to earn any of it.

Sparks fly as the two former high school acquaintances meet again in college, but the reunion leads to heartbreak. When they meet again years later, and Miguel is the new owner of the company Addy works for, will the old feelings be enough to tip them over the edge of romance or will life get in the way again?

How did you get so many followers?
- I've been on Wattpad a LONG time and slowly gathered up my followers. Other people have been on WP for less time and have even more than me. I think it just takes a popular story and being interactive with your readers!
How do I get my story popular?

title: Secrets keeper
description:
Gawking two guys in a hot-blown make-out session in the mathematical section of the library was not what I expected my first day after Winter breaks to be like.

And didn't realize that seeing them was about to change my whole high school experience...

Lillian Smith, the shy, quiet, nerdy girl, gets transferred to the most prestigious high school in her town, West Hills High, on a scholarship in her junior year. She spends half of her year hiding from the rich kids at her school to prevent any trouble. But one accidental encounter at the library with the popular bad boy of her high school changes things for her.

One little secret leads to another until Lillian gets stuck with the secrets of the popular group, The Clichés. The burden of the secrets becomes heavy, and Lillian doesn't know what to do with them anymore.

~•~•~•~•~•~

"What's your name?"

"Lillian... Lillian Smith." 

"Okay, Lillian, so this is what going to happen next." He crossed his arms. "I'm going to let you go and you-" he held his finger at me, "- will tell no one about this." I bobbed my head. "And if I hear even a single word uttering from your mouth about us..." He gestured between him and Toby. "I will-"

"- Kill you." I finished for him and give him a thumbs up. "Got it."

"Then it's settled!" Toby announced, clasping his hands and beamed. "It's going to be our little secret."

~•~•~•~•~•~

James Sirius Potter knew he was not supposed to be in his Dad's study, but when James gets curious nothing can stop him.

Arriving in the past, James is afraid. Not of the rise of Voldemort or the potential Death Eaters. No, he's terrified of what his mum is going to do to him. Suddenly staying in the 90's doesn't sound so bad.

title: Seasons of the Year (✔️)
description:
Tracy Williams, not your typical shy teenager. She is smart and not so social and is always looking for adventure. When she moved to another city to join the best university in the city. She met three popular rich guys who are best friends.Not only are they intelligent, athletic and handsome,but their personality reminded her of the seasons. Which is why she came up with "Seasons of the Year" as their group's name
        Carson Cooper, is what Tracy would define as the "winter of the year" His mysterious and cold personality makes everyone in school shiver. He hardly talks to anyone except his two best friends. His bad boy's name made everyone fear him except for someone.
         Elliot Grant, is what Tracy would define as the "summer of the year" after the cold and stormy weather. The warm of the sun brightens everyone's mood and so does he.His happy and relaxed personality is the reason why everyone want to be his friends. 
        Kyle Dallas, the last member of the group, is the "fall of the year" he is in-between summer and winter. A bit mysterious and cold yet warm and cool at times. He is liked by some but at times none.

Tracy's new adventure as a university student and meeting the three -different personality popular guys seem fun, but in reality it is different. 

Read, "Seasons of the Year" and support the Author by adding this book to your Library and Reading Lists. Share this book with others and Vote for this book.

Closing his eyes, he was feeling the soothing sound of sea waves when someone bumped into him. Abruptly opening his eyes he saw a small figure standing in front of him. 


"Please! Please help me! They... they are try... trying to kidnap me."
The women said panting.


Last time when Fawad helped a woman in danger, he was almost labeled as a murderer. Now seeing the women in front of him pleading helplessly, the whole thing was like a déjà vu. 


He was thinking of ignoring her until she spoke again.


"Please! Please save me!"
Tears were flowing through her eyes.


Unable to resist her oddly familiar pleading eyes, at last, he gave up.  


"Hop in the car."
Opening the passenger door, he ordered.



𝐴𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡'𝑠 ℎ𝑜𝑤 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑗𝑜𝑢𝑟𝑛𝑒𝑦 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑.

title: D U S K  ✔
description:
He was leaning up against the wall of the bus stop, his muscular arm above his head, his jet black hair was messy as the wind scraped past it as well.

  "You're surprisingly good at avoiding people," He stated, the deepness of his voice shocked me; it was was smooth like ribbon. He stretched closer towards me, "but, I'm surprisingly good at finding people." 

-

Everyone had heard of Adam Valentino, he wasn't shy of famous in our town. He was the classic bad boy, his reputation was well known and everyone knew that if you cross him, you wouldn't ever be able to cross him again.

This all changed, however, when he reappeared at school after a month of suddenly disappearing, with his eyesight lost and a navigator cane by his side. No one knew what had happened. 

  Except me.

title: Make You Mine Season 1 | Heartful Academy 1
description:
Tian has a rare memory disorder, he forget every moments and people he doesn't seen for a long months. Despite the condition he become one of the biggest actor in the country.

His career began to fall when fans discover how scandalous he is. He constantly stay at the bar and have a one night to every girls he meet. His life revolves around girls and being an actor.

But everything changed when he meet Haku. A mysterious guy that instantly get famous because of its charming looks. He has no idea why this guy keep coming back to his way.

Destiny bring them more closer when he was given a new project to be film inside the campus of Heartful Academy, where Haku enrolled. 

He doen'st want this guy. But unexpectedly happens. He just found himself close with him. 

Will Tian discover what's behind Haku, when he even not sure if he meet him in the past?

Heartful Academy Series is a romance fiction that full of love and life experience of characters from just one school and city. 

Make You Mine is my most memorable story on Heartful Academy Series.

title: They Bring Heaven To Me
description:
(Book 1 of the 'Heaven & Hell' series)

Summer break has just started and Tilly is in for a waking surprise. Something that will change her quiet, book infested world, upside down.

Not every picture perfect house has a picture perfect family inside. Tilly would know first hand not to judge a book by its cover, or as the wonderful Mary Poppins once said "The cover is not the book, so open it up and take a look!"

Friends meant everything to her, and with that power they can break her.

Divorce, humiliation, being left alone, growing up too fast. One thing after the other made the giggly, adventure seeking, bubbly little girl into a shy, book absorbed, mature young lady.

Forgetting was easier for her than trying to process it..

Can her once best friends who don't recognize her, bring back that little girl buried deep inside her? Or are they going to break her already bruised heart?

P.s. there will be reverse-heram in here so don't read if that makes you uncomfortable! For those of you who don't know what that is, reverse-heram is where one girl or guy ends up with multiple people. It's mainly two or more so.. yeah.

Just add it to your library, ~I know you want to~
